name: Dirt Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg instant chocolate pudding, 4 serving size
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos into fine crumbs using a food processor or rolling pin.
2. Pour milk into a large bowl.
3. Add the instant chocolate pudding mix to the milk and whisk until combined.
4. Allow the mixture to stand at room temperature for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the Cool Whip and half of the crushed Oreos.
6. Place about 1 heaping tablespoon (Tbsp) of cookie crumbs into each of 8 to 10 cups or mason jars.
7. Fill the cups about 3/4 full with the pudding mixture.
8. Top with the remaining crushed Oreos.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
10. Decorate with gummy worms before serving.
